description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling windows, especially prominent at the front, allowing for ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoors. The house includes a visible garage with space for two vehicles, and landscaped elements such as trees and shrubs are positioned around the perimeter. The main entryway is recessed and supported by columns, providing a sheltered approach. The interior layout is open, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as multiple bedrooms and bathrooms. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and an open, functional layout. Features include a double garage, landscaped surroundings, and a prominent front entryway with columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, large windows, and the double garage with two cars parked.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the back rooms, smaller windows, and landscaped trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and a more private garden area.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the flat roof, side windows, and landscaping including a prominent purple tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with columns, flat overhang, and wide glass doors
